---
title: "My Course"
subtitle: "A subtitle for my course"
author: "Prof. Jane Smith"
organization: "My University"
institute: "Institute of Something"
email: "jane.smith@university.edu"
course: "My Course"
term: "WS 2026"
lang: "de"
format:
  html: default
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    papersize: a4
    toc: false
    include-in-header: assets/latex/_handout-packages.tex
    template-partials:
      - assets/latex/before-body.tex
---

## Welcome

TODO: Add a short description or welcome message for the course.

## Course Information

| | |
|---|---|
| **Semester** | WS 2026 |
| **ECTS** | 3 |
| **Language** | EN |
| **Institution** | My University |
| **Department** | Department of Something |

## Instructors


- **Prof. Jane Smith** (lecturer) · jane.smith@university.edu



## Schedule

- **Start:** 2026-10-01
- **End:** 2027-01-31
- **Weekly day:** Monday
